programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: Many have the opportunity to know God, but many miss that precious invitation to a relationship with God.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.sub-title: Better Together: Living in the Throne Zone
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: 7 Ways the Devil Tries to Deceive People
programme.desc: God's Word is filled with truths that will guard your heart against the lies of the enemy. Learn how to stand up to his deception and be a powerful witness for Christ.

programme.title: John Wycliffe: The Morning Star
programme.desc: A docu-drama biography of the life of the 14th century scholar and cleric who translated the Bible into English for the first time. John Wycliffe was a champion of the poor against the injustices of the rich.

programme.title: Amazing Grace
programme.desc: Aretha Franklin recorded an album of gospel music at The New Temple Missionary Baptist Church. It went on to become one of the biggest and most beloved albums of her career.

programme.title: Big Lies in a Small Town
programme.desc: A young mother frantically searches for her teen daughter after their car crashes outside of a small town in the middle of nowhere and her daughter goes missing.

programme.title: Killer Fortune Teller
programme.desc: Shane Settel starts to believe in fate after a chance tarot reading. He has the largest success in his professional career and falls in love, but then tragedies begin to follow him.

programme.title: Nightmare Tenant
programme.desc: A single mum takes her daughter's advice and lets out her spare room to a student in need. But the consequences are deadly.

programme.title: Lust: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Tiffanie is about to have the wedding of her dreams to her soul mate Damon. But when Damon's old friend Trey arrives, fresh from prison, to be Damon's best man, Tiffanie's whole world is rocked.

programme.title: The Lost Wife of Robert Durst
programme.desc: Young and wide-eyed Kathie falls in love with the charming Robert Durst, only to find their marriage turning stranger and darker as time passes.

programme.title: How She Caught a Killer
programme.desc: Inspired by the real story of a female detective who went undercover to catch The Route 40 Killer.

programme.title: Nanny Dearest
programme.desc: Ex-con Taylor tracks down a married couple who received one of her eggs 10 years ago. She becomes fixated on their daughter and will stop at nothing from becoming a mother again.

programme.title: Oscar Pistorius: Blade Runner Killer
programme.desc: The true story of the sprint runner and his rise to fame as a Paralympian gold medallist. It all shattered one evening when four bullets were fired and his beautiful girlfriend's life was taken.

programme.title: A Model Murder
programme.desc: Model Kara Woods begins to get disturbing messages from one of her fans, causing her to seek help from a security influencer. Things are fine until Kara's stalker shows up in person.

programme.title: Girl in the Box
programme.desc: In 1977, Colleen Stan doesn't think twice when she hitchhikes and is picked up by young couple Cameron and Janice Hooker. But the life she knows is ripped away when they abduct her.

programme.title: The Neighbours Are Watching
programme.desc: When a handsome neighbour moves in across the street, a single woman trying to escape her past in the new subdivision believes she has witnessed her new neighbour committing a grisly murder.

programme.title: Bury The Past
programme.desc: Alice was married to a deranged, abusive man: a police officer who was regarded as a pillar of the community, but was secretly a monster.

programme.title: A Daughter's Nightmare
programme.desc: Soon after her father's death, college freshman Ariel learns her mother, Dana, has met Adam, a seemingly well-meaning and charming man at a grief support group.

programme.title: A Sister's Nightmare
programme.desc: Police officer Jane Rydert's life goes into a tailspin the day her older sister Cassidy shows up at her door after 16 years of confinement in a psychiatric hospital.

programme.title: And Baby Will Fall
programme.desc: Expectant parents become prime suspects in the disappearance of a pregnant woman who was last seen at their garage sale.

programme.title: You Better Watch Out
programme.desc: A woman stumbles into the middle of a kidnapping while stranded at a small-town airport on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: I'll Be Watching
programme.desc: After narrowly escaping the clutches of a deadly stalker, a beautiful young woman flees to a remote town, where she rebuilds her life and finds the man of her dreams.

programme.title: Amazing Grace
programme.desc: Aretha Franklin recorded an album of gospel music at The New Temple Missionary Baptist Church. It went on to become one of the biggest and most beloved albums of her career.

programme.title: Adventures of Dally & Spanky
programme.desc: A girl inherits a miniature horse that develops an unlikely friendship with her half-sister's Jack Russell Terrier, which takes to riding on the horse's back.

programme.title: Miracle Matt
programme.desc: Miracle Matt is the story of Matt Manzari. It is not only an account of how he survived 2 near death accidents, but this inspirational documentary takes a look into how he wears his scars for the world to see that miracles are possible.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Intimacy With The Father Brings Protection_Truths From Psalm 91
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is the Catholic Guy. His presentations will uplift, inform and challenge you to move to higher level of faith and life. He will leave you knowing where you want to go and what to do next.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as Songs of Praise travels throughout Britain and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: Faith Runs Deep
programme.desc: In this new program from the producers of the award-winning series, Jesus the Game Changer, host Karl Faase travels around Australia in an iconic Holden ute, discovering a rich and inspiring history of faith.

programme.title: Paul, Apostle of Christ
programme.desc: Luke risks his life to visit Paul, who is captive in a Roman prison under Nero's rule. Together, they struggle against a determined emperor and the frailties of human spirit to live out the Gospel.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Bobby Schuller provides principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: How to Walk in God_s Will (Part 2)
programme.desc: In part two of How to Walk in God's Will, Pastor Bayless continues his study of Acts and shows you how to discern the Spirit's direction and how to follow His lead no matter what opposition you face.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Ever pondered the secret to winning the battle against temptation? Today, learn practical ways to recognize and resist life's temptations before they take hold.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as Songs of Praise travels throughout Britain and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: Paul, Apostle of Christ
programme.desc: Luke risks his life to visit Paul, who is captive in a Roman prison under Nero's rule. Together, they struggle against a determined emperor and the frailties of human spirit to live out the Gospel.

programme.title: The Mercy Ship
programme.desc: Follow seven medical professionals from Northern Ireland travelling to Madagascar to volunteer on the floating hospital ship the Africa Mercy, a converted luxury cruise ship.

programme.title: Praise, Prayer and Preaching
programme.desc: The heart of the weekly teaching at Wesley Mission Sydney is the Sunday night experience in the Wesley Theatre. Be part of the weekly service with Rev Keith Garner as he shares with his congregation a message from the bible.

programme.title: St Patrick: Pilgrimage to Peace
programme.desc: St Patrick may be the most popular, yet least-known, figure in history. The average person likely has no idea who he was. Go beyond the revelry to discover the real St Patrick, a man whose life continues to call us to the peace of Christ.

programme.title: Apple of My Eye
programme.desc: A young girl struggles after a traumatic horse riding accident causes her to lose her eyesight. Charles, the head trainer of Southeastern Guide Dogs, trains Apple, a miniature horse, to be her companion and surrogate eyes.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Intimacy With The Father Brings Protection_Truths From Psalm 91 Pt 2 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame...Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy with a whole lot to learn. One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner, his mum. She knows more about shopping than solving crime, but her wisdom and kindness somehow seem to save the day.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: A vision of Dr Jack Graham to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Adventurer Leon Logothetis hops on a vintage motorbike for a 25,000-mile trip around the world with no money, food, petrol or place to stay. He puts his fate in the hands of strangers.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.sub-title: What is and What Should Never Be
programme.desc: Elizabeth encourages Gowen to seek forgiveness from Rosaleen to heal old wounds. Meanwhile Montague continues to raise suspicion. To woo the Governor, Rosemary starts a choir.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: LIFE Church - Online
programme.desc: Join Senior Pastors Paul and Maree de Jong along with the LIFE Team for their Sunday service experience, pre-recorded from their Central Campus in Auckland, New Zealand.

programme.title: Day of Discovery
programme.desc: This weekly, documentary-style series offers a view of current and historical events, biblical prophecy, and contemporary issues of importance to those of the Christian faith.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: Healing the Soul of a Woman
programme.desc: Strong women get healed and restored and keep on reaching for their dreams. Learn how to grow strong despite the hurts you've been through!

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as Songs of Praise travels throughout Britain and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: Paul, Apostle of Christ
programme.desc: Luke risks his life to visit Paul, who is captive in a Roman prison under Nero's rule. Together, they struggle against a determined emperor and the frailties of human spirit to live out the Gospel.

programme.title: I'll Be Watching
programme.desc: After narrowly escaping the clutches of a deadly stalker, a beautiful young woman flees to a remote town, where she rebuilds her life and finds the man of her dreams.

programme.title: Buried in Barstow
programme.desc: Hazel King is a single mother determined to protect her daughter from the life she once had while defending and protecting those who can't protect themselves.

programme.title: Spinning Out Of Control
programme.desc: Infatuated and obsessed with a fitness instructor, Natalie hatches a devious plan to eliminate everyone in the young woman's life so she can have her all to herself.

programme.title: Envy: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Gabrielle Flores has it all: a devoted husband, a beautiful daughter, and one of the best PR firms in the country.

programme.title: Hoax: The Kidnapping of Sherri Papini
programme.desc: In 2016, Sherri Papini goes for a run and doesn't come home. This Northern California missing person case becomes a national story when she returns and her story about being abducted doesn't add up.

programme.title: Hunt for the Labyrinth Killer
programme.desc: An ace ADA works with a driven cop to catch Daedalus, a serial killer infamous for luring his victims to their deaths with elaborate traps.

programme.title: An Amish Murder
programme.desc: A woman returns to the Amish farming community of her youth, but her peace is shattered when a murder investigation exposes a dark secret that could destroy her.

programme.title: The Girl Who Wasn't Dead
programme.desc: When 15-year-old Erica vanishes without a trace, authorities believe she may have been the victim of a serial killer.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Hidden Jewel
programme.desc: Ruby struggles to find a happy life with Beau Andreas, the true father of Pearl, and to protect their daughter. Sheltered from sorrow, Pearl thrives in the sunshine of a loving home.

programme.title: My Christmas Prince
programme.desc: A teacher returns to her home town, where she is joined by her boyfriend and learns that he is the crown prince of Madelvia.

programme.title: Look Who's Stalking
programme.desc: After the death of her stalker, a new mother pieces her life back together with the help of her new personal assistant.

programme.title: Oscar Pistorius: Blade Runner Killer
programme.desc: The true story of the sprint runner and his rise to fame as a Paralympian gold medallist. It all shattered one evening when four bullets were fired and his beautiful girlfriend's life was taken.

programme.title: Ann Rule's A Murder To Remember
programme.desc: Javier and Robin Rivera are celebrating their one-year anniversary on a camping trip. But when Javier ends up dead, Robin finds herself alone in the rough wilderness.

programme.title: Zoe Gone
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Jennifer is already struggling with single motherhood when the kidnapping of her daughter, Zoe, kicks her maternal instincts into overdrive.

programme.title: Her Affair to Die For
programme.desc: A young woman's dad becomes the obsession of her seductive roommate, who will stop at nothing to possess him.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Hidden Jewel
programme.desc: Ruby struggles to find a happy life with Beau Andreas, the true father of Pearl, and to protect their daughter. Sheltered from sorrow, Pearl thrives in the sunshine of a loving home.

programme.title: Vanished in Yosemite
programme.desc: While on vacation in Yosemite, sisters Katrina and Jennifer meet the perfect guy Rick. Katrina is certain she has met Mr Right, however, when Katrina goes missing, Jennifer suspects kidnapping.

programme.title: The Good Neighbour
programme.desc: The Good Neighbour is a docuseries that explores the complexities of poverty and challenges viewers to think about what it means to be a 'good neighbour.'.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Host Jeni Molitor and Casey Cole travel to the beautiful island of Puerto Rico where they find new adventures, try exotic foods, and minister to the next generation of young women.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.sub-title: Lighting Up The Shadow of Doubt
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame...Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Holy Moly
programme.desc: This program turns the Bible into a living, breathing colouring book that will delight children of all ages. The series focuses on the Biblical characters' actions and emotions.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in three minutes, and other random stuff to make your life awesome.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: As a teen, Karli felt she could never live up to the expectations she thought others had of her. Seeking approval or attention from other people to fit in, came at the expense of developing a true sense of self.

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.sub-title: Robert Boyle - The Man Who Saw the Future
programme.desc: In the 17th century a man set out to prove that God existed. His method - SCIENCE.

programme.title: Drive Thru History
programme.desc: Dave Stotts explores the amazing lives of the very first Christians. Using the Book of Acts as a roadmap, Dave travels the Mediterranean region to share the people, places and events that launched the faith.

programme.title: Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Exploring faith, passion and how hope emerges from tragedy, true stories of Mission Aviation Fellowship pilots who strive with missionaries and local believers to take the gospel to the most remote places on Earth.

programme.title: Jesus: Son of God?
programme.desc: Filmed in Turkey & the UK, Luke Waldock asks questions & presents answers to searching questions. This documentary sets out on a journey to discover when, where & how the vital Christian belief that Jesus is the Son of God originated.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.desc: Gary Kent is passionate about sharing the good news of Christ and preparing people for the soon coming of Jesus, offering Biblical answers to life's questions.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Intimacy With The Father Brings Protection_Truths From Psalm 91 Pt 4 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: A look at the alien and UFO phenomenon from a Christian perspective.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: The Danger in the Painless Path - Part 1
programme.desc: Why go through life wounded on the inside? Find the courage within to face your pain, receive healing from God, and go on enjoying your life!

programme.title: Finding You
programme.desc: Violinist Finley travels to a small coastal village in Ireland to begin her college semester abroad program. On the way she meets Beckett, a famous movie star, and an unexpected romance emerges.

programme.title: Live @ Psalter Studios
programme.desc: Docu-music series featuring an array of Christian musicians including such artists as Josh Cunningham (The Waifs), Anna Weatherup and Castles In Air, an Indie Rock band from California.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: God_s Way is the Best Way/Making Wise Decisions
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as personal crises and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: David Pawson
programme.desc: Why was the Bible written? UK theologian, Cambridge scholar, pastor and Bible teacher, David Pawson explores scripture and discovers some hidden gems.

programme.title: Autumn Stables
programme.desc: Recently widowed Autumn determined to start fresh, decides to sell her horse ranch to a seemingly trustworthy buyer, Jake.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Intimacy With The Father Brings Protection_Truths From Psalm 91 Pt 4 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: Whirl
programme.desc: A cartoon series about the loveable, enthusiastic kids of First Second Church. In each episode, the kids tackle a different theme that is central to Christian values. Everything from generosity and forgiveness to doubt.

programme.title: Night Owls & Early Birds
programme.sub-title: God's Love for us is Endless
programme.desc: Join Hoot, Savannah, Screech, Charlie, and Steve as they take a deeper dive into the truths found in God's Word.

programme.title: The Garden
programme.sub-title: The Truth is the Mane Thing
programme.desc: Lenny Lion and Lucy Lamb are the caretakers for a magical garden where anything can grow. They work for The Boss (God) who gives them a new assignment to complete in every episode.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: Pastors Peter and Bev Mortlock share principles for living, hear life stories from everyday New Zealanders and equip people to mature and grow into Christ-likeness while maximising their potential.

programme.title: Alaska Missionaries
programme.desc: Missionaries, doing real work, helping people in remote parts of Alaska. With breathtaking scenery, adventurous landscapes and down to earth personalities, this Alaskan show just might become your family favourite.

programme.title: Three Chairs
programme.desc: A talk show with a difference that celebrates the art of good conversation. Hosts grapple with topics including dating, phone addiction, parenting, and gender equality.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: Mike walks among the stars in Hollywood and noshes on some British pub classics with fellow vlogger Jo Franco.

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.sub-title: St. Valentine - The OG of Love
programme.desc: There are so many legends surrounding St. Valentine that he almost borders on the mythological. We go to Rome to discover why we celebrate his day every year and why his legend has survived nearly 2000 years!

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.sub-title: Better Together: Living in the Throne Zone
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: As the Holy Spirit works through us, we demonstrate Christ to the world around us.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: A vision of Dr Jack Graham to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: The Danger in the Painless Path - Part 2
programme.desc: Your painful life experiences don't have to be wasted. Discover the joy of trusting God with your pain and watching Him work all things out for your good!

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Bobby Schuller provides principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Ends of the Earth takes viewers on a 19-episode, global trek to every corner of the earth, to show how God has used ordinary people throughout history to take His saving grace to every nation and people.

programme.title: Faith Runs Deep
programme.desc: In this new program from the producers of the award-winning series, Jesus the Game Changer, host Karl Faase travels around Australia in an iconic Holden ute, discovering a rich and inspiring history of faith.

programme.title: Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Adventurer Leon Logothetis travels from Alaska to Argentina relying on the kindness of strangers and surprising unsuspecting good Samaritans with life-changing gifts!

programme.title: Soul Sessions
programme.desc: An exploration into the New Zealand gospel music scene with a focus on Pacific musicians and artists. The award-winning artists are a mix of new and established faces, who share the vision of expressing faith through music.

programme.title: Taken in Montana
programme.desc: When her parents go missing during a family vacation, a teen tries to put the clues together to find them, but she may be trusting the wrong people for help.

programme.title: You Can't Escape Me
programme.desc: An aspiring artist is finally done with her abusive husband. She knows she must start over. She thinks she is safe in Portland with a friend, but she finds herself in danger.

programme.title: Mommy Meanest
programme.desc: A teenage girl is relentlessly cyber-bullied, only to find out the horrific texts are from her own mother.

programme.title: Nightmare in the Desert
programme.desc: After returning to her childhood home, someone secretly tracks an outdoor enthusiast and her urbanite boyfriend through the desert.

programme.title: Kidnapping in the Grand Canyon
programme.desc: Two best friends hiking the Grand Canyon trust a hiking guide to take them on an off trail adventure.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Dark Angel
programme.desc: In her grandmother's fine, rich, Boston house, Heaven Casteel dreams of a wonderful new life of new friends, the best schools, clothes, and love.

programme.title: Lust: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Tiffanie is about to have the wedding of her dreams to her soul mate Damon. But when Damon's old friend Trey arrives, fresh from prison, to be Damon's best man, Tiffanie's whole world is rocked.

programme.title: Seeds of Yesterday
programme.desc: The saga of the tormented Dollangangers comes to an end where the family continues to coexist miserably.

programme.title: Petals on the Wind
programme.desc: A decade after Cathy, Christopher, and Carrie escaped from their grandparents' attic, the family attempt to put their past behind them, but soon discover certain secrets can't be left behind.

programme.title: The Beach House Murders
programme.desc: A lonely female novelist becomes a prime suspect in a homicide after a one-night tryst with a mysterious stranger who turns up dead at her summer home.

programme.title: My Nightmare Office Affair
programme.desc: Nick is a successful executive with a picture-perfect family, loving wife and adorable daughter. His boss Lisa seduces Nick in his moment of weakness, hoping to remove his wife from the picture.

programme.title: Happy Face Killer
programme.desc: Grisly serial killer Keith Hunter Jesperson taunts authorities with scribbled confessions bearing a smiley face at the scenes of his crimes. Based on a true story.

programme.title: Who Killed JonBenet?
programme.desc: Revisit the infamous murder of pint-sized beauty queen JonBenet Ramsey and the lurid details that captivated a nation.

programme.title: Stalked by a Prince
programme.desc: Publicist Alyssa thinks she's in a fairytale when she meets a British prince who whisks her away to Europe. Alyssa's dream turns into a nightmare when the prince refuses to let her leave.

programme.title: To Have and to Hold
programme.desc: Alice, who still can't believe her high school crush, the dashing, wealthy, and successful Joe, would choose to marry her, willingly allows him to mould her into his ideal socialite wife.

programme.title: Hunt for the Labyrinth Killer
programme.desc: An ace ADA works with a driven cop to catch Daedalus, a serial killer infamous for luring his victims to their deaths with elaborate traps.

programme.title: The Lost Wife of Robert Durst
programme.desc: Young and wide-eyed Kathie falls in love with the charming Robert Durst, only to find their marriage turning stranger and darker as time passes.

programme.desc: As her childhood sweetheart's bride, Heaven would savour now the love she had sought for so long. Free from her father's clutches, she would live again in her backwoods town.

programme.title: The Night Stalker
programme.desc: An attorney who lived in LA during the Night Stalker's murder spree attempts to clear the name of an inmate who she believes was wrongly accused of the crimes.

programme.title: Britney Ever After
programme.desc: The true story of Britney Jean Spears, one of the bestselling teenage music artists of all-time, whose dating life and public emotional breakdowns were the subjects of a worldwide media frenzy.

programme.title: I'll Be Watching
programme.desc: After narrowly escaping the clutches of a deadly stalker, a beautiful young woman flees to a remote town, where she rebuilds her life and finds the man of her dreams.

programme.title: Road Trip Hostage
programme.desc: A deranged criminal forces a young woman to drive him across the country.

programme.title: The Inherited
programme.desc: Eve's happily-ever-after with the man of her dreams becomes a waking nightmare after they move into the house willed to him by his first wife, who died under horrific circumstances.

programme.title: A Deadly Threat to My Family
programme.desc: Marielle becomes suspicious when her sister-in-law escapes from a cult and seeks refuge at her home. When another cult member shows up on her doorstep, she fears her daughter is their next target.

programme.title: Secrets In The Desert
programme.desc: While on a road trip through the desert, Charlie and her boyfriend Aidan break down in the middle of nowhere.

programme.title: Black Girl Missing
programme.desc: Cheryl's daughter goes missing and is nowhere to be found. Authorities and the media dismiss her as a runaway while they focus on another missing girl, who is white.

programme.title: Girl in the Box
programme.desc: In 1977, Colleen Stan doesn't think twice when she hitchhikes and is picked up by young couple Cameron and Janice Hooker. But the life she knows is ripped away when they abduct her.

programme.title: Love at First Lie
programme.desc: Kate is looking for the perfect match online when she swipes and meets Walker, a wealthy jet-setting art dealer. After Kate falls for the dashing dealer, she learns the dark truth about him.

programme.title: You Can't Take My Daughter
programme.desc: Amy is a law student in Charlotte who is attacked and raped by Demetri, a friend of a friend. Discovering that she is pregnant from the rape, Amy makes a difficult decision to keep the baby.

programme.sub-title: Captain Underpants and the Abysmal Altercation of the Abominable Altitooth
programme.desc: Eager to get the campers out of his hair, Krupp orders them to climb Plummet Peak, where a terrifying creature is rumoured to reside.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Now that they're officially on the run, the team heads down to Mexico City to hide out in one of Ms Nowhere's many safe houses. They decide to get their hands on some money by winning an underground derby race.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Camp Cretaceous
programme.desc: After discovering a scientist alone on the new island, the kids must decide whether or not they can trust this mysterious dino whisperer.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: More epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates.

programme.title: The Croods: Family Tree
programme.desc: When the Bettermans invite the Croods to join their family game night, two things become clear: Phil needs to win and Grug hates to lose.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: While Lucky attempts to win over a town that is unwelcoming to the circus, she starts to question her own reasoning to stay.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: After Scarlemagne puts a bounty on the heads of our heroes, every mute pack on the surface is after them. Still reeling from Wolf's rejection, Kipo tries to escape with Baby Dave from her new captor, Jamack.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny
programme.sub-title: Out of the Cave and Onto Thin Ice
programme.desc: After a shocking revelation, Po is determined to get his chi back and Jing decides to face Jindiao.
